hero.title: AGV Brand Kit
hero.subtitle: Official identity, assets, and usage guidelines
hero.tagline: Download official assets and follow brand standards to ensure consistent, professional communications.

overview.title: Brand Overview
overview.visionLine3: AGV NEXRUR powers the world’s first decentralized AI Power ETF.
overview.visionLine1: In the last century, oil fueled industrial wealth.
overview.visionLine2: In this century, electricity + compute will fuel AI wealth.
overview.missionText: AGV NEXRUR redefines the Real-World Asset (RWA) category by bridging clean energy, artificial intelligence, and decentralized finance. More than a tokenized asset platform, AGV positions itself as the world's first decentralized AI Power ETF — an ecosystem where real electricity and compute capacity become liquid, yield-bearing digital assets.

logo.title: Logo System
logo.description: Use the official logomark and primary logo in approved variations only. Maintain contrast and clear space for optimal legibility.
logo.logomarkDesc: Standalone symbol used for avatars, favicons, or compact placements.
logo.primaryDesc: Wordmark with symbol for standard brand placements.
logo.whiteBgDesc: Use the primary logo in full color on white.
logo.navyBgDesc: Use the white logo on dark backgrounds for contrast.
logo.skyBgDesc: Use the navy logo on light blue backgrounds.

spacing.title: Clear Space
spacing.lead: Maintain sufficient clear space around the logo to ensure visibility and impact.
spacing.minDistance: No elements should intrude within this distance.

social.title: Social Media
social.squareDesc: Use the logomark centered on a light background.
social.circleDesc: Use the logomark centered on a white circle.

favicon.title: Favicon
favicon.webDesc: Use the official 32×32 favicon for browser tabs.

colors.title: Color System
colors.description: Our color palette reflects trust, innovation, and clean technology. Each color has been carefully selected to convey our brand values and create a cohesive visual identity.
colors.navyDesc: Primary brand color for headers and backgrounds.
colors.skyDesc: Accent color for highlights and UI elements.
colors.whiteDesc: Neutral color for clarity and contrast.

gradient.title: Gradient
gradient.primaryDesc: Use the navy-to-sky gradient for hero sections and key CTAs.

typography.title: TYPOGRAPHY
typography.primaryDesc: This primary typeface helps define your company to anyone interacting with your brand.
typography.secondaryDesc: This secondary font supports the primary and complements the brand.
typography.usageDesc: Headline sizes are reserved for key moments where clarity, impact, and authority are essential.

photography.title: PHOTOGRAPHY
photography.lead: A style guide to ensure imagery maintains a consistent aesthetic representative of the brand.
